top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a1.element
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT element
FROM atom
JOIN connected ON atom.atom_id = connected.atom_id
JOIN bond ON connected.bond_id = bond.bond_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = 'triple'
UNION
SELECT element
FROM atom
JOIN connected ON atom.atom_id = connected.atom_id2
JOIN bond ON connected.bond_id = bond.bond_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT DISTINCT a1.element
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT DISTINCT a.element
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id IN (c.atom_id, c.atom_id2)
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT DISTINCT a.element
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT DISTINCT a1.element
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT DISTINCT a.element
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id IN (c.atom_id, c.atom_id2)
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT DISTINCT a1.element, a2.element
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a1.element
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple';
